---
title: "History of Game Theory & Mathematics"
description: "From Cournot 1838 through von Neumann, Nash, Selten, to modern Nobel laureates."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="history-of-gt-mathematics"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>History of Game Theory & Mathematics</h1>
  <p class="lead">From Cournot 1838 through von Neumann, Nash, Selten, to modern Nobel laureates.</p>
</div>
```
